73 A1550D_OTHR_ORGNC_MR_DD_CD A1550D_OTHR_ORGNC_MR_DD_CD A1550D MR/DD Status: Other Organic MR/DD Condition Code CHAR 1 The data in this column identifies if the resident has another organic condition related to MD/DD (Mental
